zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Rayner於1542年出生在英國艾可可爾斯特時，她的父親Henry Rayner22歲，母親Elizabeth Tanner17歲。她於1559年6月20日與John Cummings在英國戴文比曉普斯 尼普頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1573年5月11日在英國艾可伯奇享年31歲。

nameMeanings.name: Rayner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name from an inflected form of German rein or central Yiddish rayn ‘pure’.

variants.name: Renner
meanings: English, German, and Swiss German: from an agent derivative of Middle English, Middle High German rennen ‘to run’, hence an occupational name for a messenger, normally a mounted and armed military servant. This surname is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine).
English and German: variant of English   Rayner  , German   Reiner  .

variants.name: Raynor
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Rainer, Reiner, Renier (ancient Germanic Raginhari, from ragin ‘counsel’ + hari, heri ‘army’). The surname was later much confused with Reynold and Renard .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Rayner was born in 1542, in Colchester, Essex, England, her father, Henry Rayner, was 22 and her mother, Elizabeth Tanner, was 17. She married John Cummings on 20 June 1559, in Bishops Nympton, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 May 1573, in Birch, Essex, England, at the age of 31.

Elle a épousé John Cummings le 20 juin 1559, à Bishops Nympton, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 mai 1573, à Birch, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Raynerが1542年にイギリスエセックスコルチェスターで生まれた時，父Henry Raynerは22歳，母Elizabeth Tannerは17歳であった。1559年6月20日にイギリスデボンビショプス ニーンプトンでJohn Cummingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1573年5月11日にイギリスエセックスバーチで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Rayner(이)가 1542년 영국 에세스 코체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Rayner(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Tanner(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1559년 6월 20일 영국 데폰 비숍스 니프턴에서 John Cummings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1573년 5월 11일 영국 에세스 비르치에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Rayner родилась в 1542 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Rayner было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Tanner, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cummings 20 июня 1559 г. в местности бишопс нимптон, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 мая 1573 г. в местности бирч, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 31 год.
